char_status: Deputy director of 狩灵协会1科, Ninth 苍白爪牙

appearance.face: Pale gray eyes, heavy dark circles beneath.
appearance.clothing: White jacket and trousers, black shirt, white tie, black shoes.
appearance.weapon: Left arm encased in gauntlet, its shoulder holding three replaceable single-use injector ampoules: milky white combat sustenance; yellow combat enhancement; red terminal overload. Left hand fitted with 心灵遮断合金 claws, forged to cut 灵能, purpose-built for combat against 恶灵 and 灵能 equipment.

char_description.overview: Burns at quintuple rate, knows her remaining years.
char_description.combat_style: Closes distance without pause, 心灵遮断合金 claw nullifies 灵能 barriers on contact, injects ampoules stepwise as combat demands.

char_personality.strengths: Absolute composure under physical deterioration; Reads 灵力 patterns clinically.
char_personality.flaws: Forfeited her future; Speaks so rarely her voice cracks.

char_background.origin: 1科 狩灵, chosen at 29 as ninth 苍白爪牙 after the eighth fell. Signed knowing the survival rate, implanted with 暴食灵力回路 at 狩灵协会1科.
char_background.current_mission: Enforce 狩灵协会1科 authority against threats 常规狩灵 cannot handle.

char_special_abilities.灵力回路-暴食: Five times normal human metabolic rate, granting physical capabilities far beyond ordinary people. Energy consumption and aging rate are also quintupled. Requires constant massive food intake to sustain. Circuit runs continuously, cannot be deactivated.
